vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1295 (feat(packs): skills-pack-0.1 -- second tier-3 pack); scope finalized after the #1294 lessons pilot proved the pattern and #1637/#1643 landed pack discovery. Part of the #742 / #1284 decomposition.

plan.title: skills-pack-0.1 -- second tier-3 pack (generalizes the #1294 machinery)

narratives.Description: Stand up the second tier-3 extension pack and, in doing so, prove the #1294 pack machinery generalizes beyond lessons. Define a skills-pack-0.1 schema, build a structured source capturing metadata (name, description, triggers, path, version) for every skill, register the pack so it auto-appears in task packs:slice --list-packs, and ship by-trigger / list slices over that metadata so an agent can resolve which skill handles a routing keyword. As the renderer proof, migrate exactly ONE small skill's full SKILL.md into the structured source and regenerate that SKILL.md as a banner-marked projection guarded by the drift gate; the other skills keep their hand-authored SKILL.md for later iteration. The lessons-specific renderer/registry from #1294 is generalized (not copy-pasted) so the rollout pattern is validated on a second domain.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Add vbrief/schemas/skills-pack.schema.json: pack id/version, skill-entry shape (id/name, description, triggers[], path, version, body), and the named-slice registry (by-trigger -> filter trigger; list/all -> no filter). 2. Generalize the renderer/registry so scripts/pack_render.py and scripts/packs_slice.py are pack-agnostic (driven by the pack schema + a registry entry) rather than lessons-specific; add the trigger filter to the resolver's fixed filter vocabulary. 3. Add scripts/pack_migrate_skills.py to build packs/skills/skills-pack-0.1.json: parse each skills/*/SKILL.md YAML frontmatter (name, description) and the AGENTS.md skill-routing table (trigger keywords -> path), and capture the full body of ONE designated small proof skill; commit the generated source. 4. Render the proof skill's SKILL.md from source with a provenance banner, commit it, and extend the drift gate (task verify:pack-drift) to cover the skills pack. 5. Wire tasks/packs.yml for the skills pack and add in-process tests in tests/cli/test_packs_slice.py (skills by-trigger/list, --list-packs shows skills) and a skills render/migration test.
narratives.UserStory: As an agent deciding which skill to run, I want task packs:slice skills by-trigger to return the skill whose routing keywords match my situation, so that I resolve the right skill from structured metadata instead of scanning every SKILL.md.
narratives.Traces: planRef #1295; epic #1284; decomposition_origin #742; Phase 1 pilot #1294; pack discovery #1637/#1643; design #1283.

items.title: skills-pack-0.1 schema + structured source (all skills' metadata)

narrative.Acceptance: A migration creates packs/skills/skills-pack-0.1.json holding name, description, triggers, and path for every skill, and the source validates against vbrief/schemas/skills-pack.schema.json.

items.title: Pack machinery generalizes to a second pack

narrative.Acceptance: task packs:slice --list-packs displays both the lessons and skills packs, and the renderer and slice resolver are driven by the pack schema rather than lessons-specific code paths.

items.title: by-trigger and list slices over skill metadata

narrative.Acceptance: task packs:slice skills by-trigger --trigger <keyword> returns the matching skill entries, and the list slice returns every skill with its description, in text and json.

items.title: Renderer + drift proof on ONE migrated skill

narrative.Acceptance: task packs:render regenerates the one designated proof skill's SKILL.md from the source with a provenance banner, and task verify:pack-drift fails when that rendered SKILL.md diverges from the committed file.

expected_outputs: task packs:slice skills by-trigger returns matching skills from structured metadata
--list-packs shows both lessons and skills; drift gate covers the proof skill
